## Conversion.ConverterResultTypes type

Helper type to map a tuple of [Converters](./ts-utils.converter.md) to a tuple of their result types.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ConverterResultTypes<T extends readonly Converter<unknown, unknown>[]> = {
    [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends Converter<infer R, unknown> ? R : never;
};
```
**References:** [Converter](./ts-utils.converter.md)
